title: PIREX Square pan 25x22 Kitchen Preparation
features: Designed to heat and cook evenly
The non-porous surface of borosilicate glass is scratch, stain and odour resistant, making it 100 percent hygienic and healthier solution to other types of cookware
Reliable quality, withstand heat from -40C up to +300C
description: Product Description Arcuisine Square Roaster is made of borosilicate glass. Glass is a great hygienic material that makes it ideal for healthy cooking and eating. Reliable quality roster that withstand heat from -40 degrees C up to +300 degrees C. Square Roaster can sustain high thermal and mechanical shocks. The Roster has 5 year guarantee against manufacturer defects. It measures 22 cm length by 22 cm width. Box Contains 1 x Square Roaster
